name: Footer
description: Action footer bar used at the bottom of modals, cards, and page sections to hold primary and secondary action buttons.

type.description: Layout of the action buttons — right-aligned, full-width horizontal, or stacked vertical.

divider.description: Shows a divider line above the footer.

leadingActions.description: Shows buttons in the leading (left) slot.

trailingActions.description: Shows buttons in the trailing (right) slot.

typography._note: Footer contains Button instances — typography follows Button spec.

do: Use at the bottom of modals, cards, or page sections for action buttons
Place the primary action in the trailing (right) position
Use right-aligned for modals, horizontal for mobile, vertical for stacked actions
dont: Don't use without at least one action button
Don't place more than three buttons in a single footer
Don't use as a standalone component outside of a container

accessibility.keyboard: Tab moves between action buttons. Button keyboard behavior applies.
